National Convention Exclusive · All One-of-One

Johnny BenchNational Exclusive

Autographed / One-of-One / National Exclusive

A single-subject National Convention exclusive. Every card is a Johnny Bench autograph and every parallel is a one-of-one — 158 one-of-ones across the release. Each foil board is produced as a run of 1/1 parallels (production slots P01–P10), in two photo variations (JB1 / JB2). The parallel slots for each board are listed below.

Subsets & Numbering

Every card in this release is an autographed one-of-one. Each foil board is produced as a run of 1/1 parallels filling production slots P01–P10; the slots listed on each board show how many distinct one-of-ones exist, in each of two photo variations (JB1 / JB2). Card codes show ‹INI› in place of the variation initials and carry a trailing A except where the production master records none.

SIGNED1/1 Autographed one-of-one Every card is autographed and serial numbered 1/1 · P01–P10 references the 1/1 parallel slots per foil board
Johnny Bench · National ExclusiveProduction Checklist · v2◆ Wild Card

Checklist generated from the production master for grading submission and collector reference. Every card is autographed by Johnny Bench and every parallel is a one-of-one. The slot references (P01–P10) on each foil board indicate how many distinct 1/1 parallels are produced for that board, in each of two photo variations (JB1 / JB2). Card codes show ‹INI› in place of the variation initials (JB1 / JB2).
